subject: feat(embed): implement iframe embed system with auto-resize and code generator
body:
Phase 3 implementation — embeddable forms:
- embedResize module: ResizeObserver + MutationObserver watches form container
  height, posts changes to parent via postMessage. Handles conditional fields,
  validation errors, and page transitions.
- embed.js host script: finds data-fourems-form elements, creates iframes with
  ?embed=1, listens for resize messages and auto-adjusts iframe height.
- EmbedCodeDialog: modal with two methods — script embed (recommended, auto-resize)
  and direct iframe (manual height). Copy-to-clipboard with fallback.
- PublicFormPage: detects embed mode (iframe or ?embed param), activates resize
  communication, uses tighter padding in embed context.
- Builder header: Embed button opens the code generator dialog.

Tags: embed, iframe, postMessage, ResizeObserver
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
